# Institution Cockpit demo: the object-permanent selves tour (v14 home)

## Context

The #13444 demo leaf per the operator's checklist audit (rule 2: every massive epic files its demo leaf). The v14 home's only-Neo-can-show-this story as a public artifact: **residents with histories** — the same peer across model swaps, deeds accumulating, the COP summoning two planes on demand.

## The Problem

The v14 epic's thesis ("the first UI whose subject is a persistent cross-family institution") is exactly the class that needs SHOWING: execution-trace observability products have no team to film. Without a filed demo leaf, the epic's reach story stays aspirational and the E-guardrail has nothing to measure.

## The Architectural Reality

- Files now, sequences LATE (post the design-SSOT + first COP render leaves — the ADR 0032 §5 gate lifted, but surfaces must exist to tour).
- Tour beats (the record, not the mold — §2.3 discipline in the demo itself): open the home → a resident's constellation (deeds/trail depth, not status cards) → the self-view re-inhabitation story → the reflexive era fixture (the SAME peer, June-Opus → July-Fable, one identity) → the COP summoning knowledge + possession planes → the work→app flow beat (#13442's line).
- Deterministic NL-driven tour = spec = recording script (the established demo contract); public-safe; reach categories per the guardrail at publication.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Deterministic tour over the real v14 surfaces (two runs, identical beats); doubles as e2e + recording script.
- [ ] The era-swap beat renders the §2.3.7 reflexive fixture live (same resident, engine as metadata).
- [ ] Anti-lock-in demonstrated, not just claimed: a rename or trait-retirement beat renders as narrative (§2.3.5 GROWTH class).
- [ ] Public-safe + fresh-checkout runnable; cross-family review before merge.

## Out of Scope

The surfaces (the epic's view leaves) · the cockpit walkthrough (#14646 — the v13.2 sibling; this is the v14 capstone) · metric infra (#14442 discipline consumed).

## Related

Epic #13444 (parent) · ADR 0032 · #14646 (sibling demo) · #14636 (terrain panel home) · D#14561 rule-2.

Sweeps: current window; no equivalent; A2A clean. Structure-map: N/A — demo/tour leaf.
